swimTPacePer100m.notes: Derived from 1000m in 25:00. Recommend in-app test week 1.

bikeFtpWatts.notes: Reverse-engineered from Strava power zones. May be stale; recommend FTP test week 1-2.

bikeThresholdHr.notes: Approximated from Strava HR zones (top of Z3).

warnings: Compressed timeline: 14 weeks until race vs Friel canonical 24-28. Plan generator must handle compressed periodization.
Bike FTP and threshold HR estimated from Strava zones, not direct measurement. Schedule FTP test in week 1-2.
Swim T-pace estimated from 1000m time, not measured T-pace. Schedule swim test in week 1.
Recent intensity distribution (per Strava power zones, last 12 months) shows ~50% time in Z3+, suggesting unpolarized training. Plan should shift toward 80/20 polarized base in early weeks.

SYNTHETIC FIXTURE: trainingDaysPerWeek=5. At <7 days, Friel rule 22 (>=3 workouts per sport weekly) cannot be satisfied without two-a-days. Plan must flag every affected week with [DEVIATION:] tag and choose either reduced sport coverage or suggest opt-in two-a-days.
